name: American Savings Bank, National Association
description_short: American Savings Bank is a Hawaii-based national bank offering personal and business banking, mortgages, loans, credit cards, and investment services through branches, online, and mobile platforms.
description_long:
American Savings Bank, National Association is a full-service bank headquartered in Hawaii with a strong local presence across the islands. The bank has built its reputation around serving Hawaii residents and businesses since being voted one of Hawaii's Best Banks since 2018. ASB operates as a traditional national bank with both personal and commercial banking divisions, maintaining physical branch locations throughout Hawaii while offering comprehensive digital banking services.

ASB's service portfolio spans personal banking (checking, savings, CDs, mortgages, home equity lines of credit, personal loans, credit cards), business banking (commercial checking, savings, cash management, commercial real estate loans, merchant services), and investment services through partnerships with Cetera and Franklin Madison Group LLC. The bank offers certificates of deposit with competitive rates (currently advertising 6-month CDs up to 3.10% APY), online and mobile banking available 24/7, ATM networks, wire transfers, and foreign currency exchange. They also provide student loan options through College Ave and financial education through free courses designed by Banzai.

What distinguishes ASB is its strong "Buy Local Hawaii" program, which provides exclusive discounts at over 125 local merchants across Hawaii islands to ASB Visa debit cardholders, saving customers more than $1.5 million collectively. The bank emphasizes waived monthly service fees on personal checking accounts, no-fee services on various transactions, and a user-friendly mobile app that was recognized as one of Hawaii's best-ranked online banking apps. ASB also positions itself around customer accessibility with features like low-vision accessibility options and dedicated customer service for both personal and business clients.

ASB is a legitimate, FDIC-insured national bank with a routing number (321370765) and established physical presence. However, as a regional bank focused primarily on Hawaii, it has geographic limitations for customers outside the islands. The bank's product offerings are standard for traditional banks and not particularly innovative compared to fintech competitors, though this may appeal to customers preferring established institutions over digital-only banks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal loans and lines of credit
Credit cards with local merchant rewards
Wire transfers and foreign currency exchange
pros: Exclusive Buy Local Hawaii program providing discounts at 125+ local merchants with ASB Visa debit card
No monthly service fee on personal checking accounts (with qualifying conditions)
Competitive CD rates advertised at 3.10% APY for 6-month terms
24/7 availability of online, mobile, phone banking, and ATMs
Recognized as one of Hawaii's Best Banks since 2018 with strong local reputation
Comprehensive digital banking with updated mobile app rated among Hawaii's best
Full suite of services including mortgages, business banking, investments, and insurance partnerships
cons: Geographic limitation: primarily serves Hawaii; limited accessibility for mainland customers
No mention of competitive rates compared to national banks or online-only banks on checking/savings products
Limited innovation in product offerings compared to fintech and digital banking competitors
Mortgage and loan products require application process with no indication of streamlined online approval
Student loans only offered through College Ave partnership rather than in-house product
best_for: Hawaii residents seeking local banking with community-focused rewards and merchant discounts
Small business owners and commercial entities operating in Hawaii requiring business banking services
Mortgage borrowers in Hawaii wanting local lender relationships and in-person support
Customers prioritizing established, FDIC-insured banking over fintech alternatives
diagnosis: American Savings Bank is best for Hawaii residents and businesses seeking comprehensive banking services with strong local community integration and merchant rewards. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—this bank is designed for Hawaii-based customers and offers limited value to mainland users without Hawaii ties.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
